name: Cecil
identity_string: 45 years old, female, Filipino descent, average body type, black hair extending past shoulders, warm skin complexion, dark eyes partially closed, dark brown hair with blonde streaks, center parting, straight to mildly wavy hair texture

attributes.distinctive_face: Warm skin tone, dark eyes squinted slightly against the bright sunlight, and straight-to-slightly-wavy dark brown hair with lighter highlights parted down the middle.
